publishedAbstract: NooBaa/Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG) fails to determine AWS region. This issue has been seen in ODF upgrades, or node name changes to a different region that no longer has the region in the node name. As a result, NooBaa is unable to parse, reconcile, and determine the proper region which can result in a `Configuring`, `Connecting`, or `Rejected` Phase. ~~~ time="2024-11-04T21:36:13Z" level=error msg="Got error from util.GetAWSRegion(). will use arnPrefix=\"arn:aws:s3:::\". error=The parsed AWS region is invalid: \"\"" sys=openshift-storage/noobaa ~~~
publishedTitle: NooBaa System Phase is "Configuring" After Upgrade - The parsed AWS region is invalid: \"\" - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
